sentences.en: We launched a drip campaign targeting dormant users who haven't logged in for 30 days.
sentences.zh: 我们针对30天未登录的沉默用户启动了一个滴灌式邮件营销活动。

sentences.en: The viral coefficient exceeded 1.2, meaning each user is bringing more than one new user.
sentences.zh: 病毒系数超过了1.2，意味着每个用户带来了不止一个新用户。

sentences.en: Attribution modeling shows that social media is an undervalued touchpoint in our funnel.
sentences.zh: 归因模型显示社交媒体是我们漏斗中一个被低估的触点。

sentences.en: We should implement progressive profiling to reduce friction on the sign-up form.
sentences.zh: 我们应该实施渐进式信息收集，以减少注册表单的摩擦。

sentences.en: The uplift from the personalized homepage experiment was statistically significant.
sentences.zh: 个性化首页实验带来的提升在统计上是显著的。

example.en: Reactivating dormant users is cheaper than acquiring new ones.
example.zh: 重新激活沉默用户比获取新用户更便宜。

example.en: Multi-touch attribution gives a fairer picture of channel contribution.
example.zh: 多触点归因能更公平地反映各渠道的贡献。

example.en: Every touchpoint is an opportunity to reinforce the brand message.
example.zh: 每个触点都是强化品牌信息的机会。

example.en: The experiment showed a 9% uplift in click-through rate.
example.zh: 实验显示点击率提升了9%。

example.en: Removing unnecessary friction from the checkout flow increased completion by 20%.
example.zh: 去除结账流程中不必要的摩擦使完成率提升了20%。

sentences.en: We need to instrument the new feature so we can track usage from day one.
sentences.zh: 我们需要对新功能做埋点，这样从第一天起就能追踪使用情况。

sentences.en: The 95th percentile latency spiked after we rolled out the update.
sentences.zh: 更新上线后，P95延迟出现了飙升。

sentences.en: Feature flags allow us to decouple deployment from release.
sentences.zh: 功能开关让我们可以把部署和发布解耦。

sentences.en: The cohort analysis revealed that users acquired in January had better lifetime value.
sentences.zh: 队列分析显示1月获取的用户拥有更高的生命周期价值。

sentences.en: We are shipping an MVP first and will iterate based on early feedback.
sentences.zh: 我们先上线一个最小可行产品，然后基于早期反馈迭代。

example.en: Make sure to instrument every key interaction in the user flow.
example.zh: 确保对用户流程中每个关键交互做埋点。

example.en: High latency on the trading page directly impacts user satisfaction.
example.zh: 交易页面的高延迟直接影响用户满意度。

example.en: We decoupled the backend service to allow independent scaling.
example.zh: 我们对后端服务做了解耦，以支持独立扩展。

example.en: Analyze each cohort separately to find retention patterns.
example.zh: 分别分析每个队列以发现留存规律。

example.en: We plan to iterate on the design after the first round of user testing.
example.zh: 我们计划在第一轮用户测试后对设计进行迭代。

sentences.en: The company's free cash flow has been consistently positive for eight consecutive quarters.
sentences.zh: 该公司的自由现金流已连续八个季度保持正值。

sentences.en: Short sellers are betting against the stock due to slowing revenue growth.
sentences.zh: 由于营收增速放缓，卖空者正在做空该股票。

sentences.en: The yield curve inversion has historically been a reliable recession indicator.
sentences.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂在历史上一直是可靠的衰退指标。

sentences.en: Management guided for mid-single-digit revenue growth in the next fiscal year.
sentences.zh: 管理层指引下一财年营收增速为中个位数。

sentences.en: The stock rallied on news of a strategic partnership with a major cloud provider.
sentences.zh: 因与大型云服务商达成战略合作的消息，股价大涨。

example.en: Tech stocks rallied after the Fed signaled a pause in rate hikes.
example.zh: 美联储释放暂停加息信号后，科技股大涨。

example.en: Defensive sectors tend to outperform during a recession.
example.zh: 防御性板块往往在经济衰退期间表现更好。

example.en: The fiscal year ends in March for many Japanese companies.
example.zh: 许多日本公司的财年在3月结束。

example.en: The company raised its full-year guidance after a strong first half.
example.zh: 在强劲的上半年后，公司上调了全年业绩指引。

example.en: An inverted yield curve often precedes an economic downturn.
example.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂往往先于经济下行出现。

sentences.en: I would like you to take ownership of the entire onboarding redesign project.
sentences.zh: 我希望你能全权负责整个新手引导改版项目。

sentences.en: Let's set up a cadence of weekly syncs to keep everyone on the same page.
sentences.zh: 让我们建立每周同步会的节奏，确保所有人保持信息一致。

sentences.en: The performance review cycle begins next month, so start documenting your achievements.
sentences.zh: 绩效评估周期下个月开始，请开始记录你的成果。

sentences.en: We need to upskill the team on data literacy to make better decisions.
sentences.zh: 我们需要提升团队的数据素养，以做出更好的决策。

sentences.en: Please escalate the issue to the engineering lead if it is not resolved by end of day.
sentences.zh: 如果今天下班前问题没解决，请升级到工程负责人。

example.en: Taking ownership means being accountable for both success and failure.
example.zh: 承担主人翁意识意味着对成功和失败都负责。

example.en: Our team operates on a two-week sprint cadence.
example.zh: 我们团队按两周冲刺的节奏运作。

example.en: The company invested in upskilling employees on AI tools.
example.zh: 公司投资提升员工的AI工具技能。

example.en: Do not hesitate to escalate critical bugs to the on-call engineer.
example.zh: 遇到关键bug不要犹豫，直接上报给值班工程师。

example.en: Let's have a quick sync before the client meeting.
example.zh: 客户会议前我们快速同步一下。

sentences.en: We are adopting a platform strategy to build an ecosystem around our core product.
sentences.zh: 我们正在采用平台策略，围绕核心产品构建生态系统。

sentences.en: The land-and-expand model has proven effective in the enterprise segment.
sentences.zh: 先落地再扩张的模式在企业级市场已被证明是有效的。

sentences.en: First-mover advantage is less important than execution speed in this market.
sentences.zh: 在这个市场中，先发优势不如执行速度重要。

sentences.en: We should benchmark our unit economics against the top three competitors.
sentences.zh: 我们应该将单位经济模型与前三名竞争对手进行对标。

sentences.en: The strategic moat comes from proprietary data that competitors cannot replicate.
sentences.zh: 战略护城河来自竞争对手无法复制的专有数据。

example.en: A healthy developer ecosystem drives platform adoption.
example.zh: 健康的开发者生态系统推动平台采用。

example.en: We benchmark our NPS score against industry leaders every quarter.
example.zh: 我们每季度将NPS分数与行业领先者对标。

example.en: Switching costs create a strong moat for the business.
example.zh: 转换成本为业务构建了强大的护城河。

example.en: Our proprietary algorithm gives us an edge in trade execution.
example.zh: 我们的专有算法在交易执行上给了我们优势。

example.en: Healthy unit economics are essential before scaling a business.
example.zh: 在扩大业务规模之前，健康的单位经济模型是必要的。
